title: stellera elliptica
intro: Stellera elliptica, also known as the "King's Cotton," is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In traditional herbal medicine, Stellera elliptica is often prepared as an infusion, tincture, or topical cream, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
